title: ‘Not many mechanical keyboards offer better value than this’: I was impressed by the quality of this budget Keychron — but there’s one area where it’s sorely lacking
summary: From the aluminum frame and Double Shot PBT keycaps to the 8K polling rate and hot-swappable mechanical switches, the K2 Ultra 8K certainly has the makings of a top-flight keyboard.
